docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 21309, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALDERMAN GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAECZYSKI ANDRE $5.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5.00, DEF'S ORDERED TO RETURN PLTF'S PARROT TO PLTF. JUDG.ENTERED ON 1/15/92 IN SUP.CT.SCA 21309 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PAECZYSKI ANDRE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ALDERMAN GLORIA NOT APPEALED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER ON MOTION AND PARTIAL SATISFACTION OF JUDGEMENT ON SCA 21309 STATES: DELIVERY OF THE PARROT AND CAGE TO PLTF. WAS MADE IN OPEN
COURT AND THE JUDGEMENT IS SATISFIED, SAVE FOR COSTS PREVIOUSLY AWARDED.DATED: MAY 18, 1993. SIGNED BY: W. ROBERT BUXTON JUDGE PRO TEM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY ALDERMAN GLORIA AS TO DEFENDANT PAECZYSKI ANDRE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-07-1991, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-12-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAECZYSKI ANDRE
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PAECZYSKI ANDRE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ALDERMAN GLORIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALDERMAN GLORIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAECZYSKI ANDRE $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $5.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $205.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT PAECZYSKI ANDRE
